headline: Jobs, GM, Tesla, Alphabet, Intel, Verizon, and More to Watch This Week
summary: It’s a heavy earnings week, with results also coming in from Halliburton, 3M, AT&T, Blackstone, and more. On the economic front, we’ll see data on jobs, new-home sales, and industry purchasing activity.
